g.text: Duck behind a plinth as {GUARD} passes.
Freeze in the open and hope.
Keep going blind into the dark.
Steady it before the glass cracks.
Settle in to read the code.
Read the first line of the cipher.
Rush across before it swings back.
Set the rings exactly as decoded.
Start over and decode it properly.
Follow the draught to the side door.
Keep {V_LETTER} safe and leave the rest.
Carry the whole truth up into the mornin...
Slip out with {V_LETTER} and a plan.
Keep tracing it as the sky greys.
Keep it a secret with your friends.
Seal the secret with a promise.
Leave the clue and slip away.
Slip it in your bag and run.
Set it back where it belongs.
Reach the hall with the bells ringing.
